title: elatostema kabayense
intro: Elatostema kabayense is a species of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae, commonly known as the "Mountain Carrot" or "Wild Spinach". It is a type of edible leafy green plant that has been traditionally used in various herbal medicine practices for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Elatostema kabayense include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be consumed raw in salads or cooked as a vegetable, and the plant can also be used to make teas and infusions.
